unresolved.author: cursor
unresolved.body:
### New legend "B partial" pill lacks styling modifier **Medium Severity** The newly-added legend paragraph contains `B partial` using the base `rs-pill` class with no color modifier. The base `.rs-pill` has no `border`, no `background`, and no specific `color`, so this pill renders as naked text. It sits directly alongside three other pills that all have proper styling (`rs-pill--teal` for "A cost leader" and "A VIABLE", `rs-pill--magenta` for "C toy"), creating the same visual inconsistency this PR fixes for the "partial" pill in the memory report. The `rs-pill--dim` modifier (or another appropriate class) is likely needed here too.
 
Reviewed by [Cursor Bugbot](https://cursor.com/bugbot) for commit 10e758a3b1fc4fa81da35f936700edefa4800686. Configure [here](https://www.cursor.com/dashboard/bugbot).

unresolved.author: sourcery-ai
unresolved.body:
Hey - I've left some high level feedback:

- The global `*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; }` reset is a broad change; consider scoping it to the research layout container (or confirming other parts of the app don’t rely on content-box) to avoid subtle layout regressions elsewhere.
- Since the `A` → `A VIABLE` label change is a semantic tweak as well as a visual one, it may help to ensure any references (e.g., legend, filters, or copy describing tiers) consistently use the same wording so users don’t see mismatched terminology.

<details>
<summary>Prompt for AI Agents</summary>

~~~markdown
Please address the comments from this code review:

## Overall Comments
- The global `*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; }` reset is a broad change; consider scoping it to the research layout container (or confirming other parts of the app don’t rely on content-box) to avoid subtle layout regressions elsewhere.
- Since the `A` → `A VIABLE` label change is a semantic tweak as well as a visual one, it may help to ensure any references (e.g., legend, filters, or copy describing tiers) consistently use the same wording so users don’t see mismatched terminology.
~~~

</details>

***

unresolved.author: qodo-code-review[bot]
unresolved.body:
Review Summary by Qodo

Fix topbar alignment and pill visual consistency bugs 🐞 Bug fix

Walkthroughs

Description 
• Fix topbar misalignment by 63.5px using global box-sizing: border-box reset
• Add rs-pill--dim class to Tencent partial verdict for outline consistency
• Relabel three Anthropic tier pills from "A" to "A VIABLE" for visual consistency
Diagram
```mermaid flowchart LR A["CSS box-sizing issue"] -->|"Add global border-box reset"| B["Topbar aligns with body"] C["Partial pill no outline"] -->|"Add rs-pill--dim class"| D["Consistent pill styling"] E["Single-letter A pills"] -->|"Relabel to A VIABLE"| F["Uniform pill widths"] ```

File Changes

1. 2026-05-15_claude-code-via-dial-poc/index.html 🐞 Bug fix +3/-3
>Relabel Anthropic tier pills for consistency >
>• Relabel three Anthropic Claude model tier pills from "A" to "A VIABLE"
>• Maintains tier classification while fixing visual inconsistency with single-letter appearance
>• Affects Haiku 4.5, Sonnet 4.6, and Opus 4.7 rows in ranked table
>
> > 2026-05-15_claude-code-via-dial-poc/index.html
2. 2026-05-19_choosing-memory-for-enterprise-agents/index.html 🐞 Bug fix +1/-1
>Add dim styling to partial verdict pill >
>• Add rs-pill--dim class to Tencent maintenance posture "partial" verdict pill
>• Changes from partial to partial
>• Adds subtle white outline at low alpha to match visual treatment of other verdict pills
>
> > 2026-05-19_choosing-memory-for-enterprise-agents/index.html
3. assets/dialx/research.css 🐞 Bug fix +7/-0
>Add global box-sizing border-box reset >
>• Add global CSS reset: *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; }
>• Placed at top of stylesheet before other rules
>• Fixes root cause of topbar misalignment by ensuring max-width caps border box instead of content
>  box
>• Allows margin: 0 auto to properly center main element, aligning topbar mark with body section
>  labels
>
> > assets/dialx/research.css

<!-- walkthrough_start -->

## Walkthrough

This PR makes three targeted styling and content changes to research evaluation pages. A global CSS reset rule is added to `assets/dialx/research.css` to enforce `box-sizing: border-box` across all elements and pseudo-elements. Two HTML pages receive verdict pill refinements: the Claude code evaluation table now labels the three Anthropic models' Tier pills with "A VIABLE" instead of generic "A" labels, and the Agent-Memory evaluation table applies the `rs-pill--dim` modifier class to the Maintenance posture partial verdict badge.

## Possibly related PRs

- [agorokh/applied-ai-research#2](https://github.com/agorokh/applied-ai-research/pull/2): Earlier PR introduces the broader `dialx` markup and CSS system for verdict pills and `research.css`, which these changes refine.
- [agorokh/applied-ai-research#5](https://github.com/agorokh/applied-ai-research/pull/5): Related table reformatting and styling cleanup work affecting the same Memory report pages and verdict pill presentation.

<!-- walkthrough_end -->

ledger.author: sourcery-ai[bot]
ledger.body:
Reviewer's guide (collapsed on small PRs) ## Reviewer's Guide Aligns the topbar with main content by introducing a global box-sizing reset, and fixes two pill-UI inconsistencies in ranked and criteria tables for visual consistency with the design system. #### Flow diagram for box-sizing reset aligning topbar and main content ```mermaid flowchart LR A[Browser loads page] --> B[Load research_css] B --> C[Apply global box-sizing border-box] C --> D[main width includes padding-right 252] D --> E[main hits max-width 1240] E --> F[margin 0 auto centers main] F --> G[topbar inner also centered] G --> H[Topbar mark and body section labels share same left x] ``` ### File-Level Changes | Change | Details | Files | | ------ | ------- | ----- | | Introduce global border-box sizing to fix topbar vs. main-content horizontal misalignment. |
  • Add a global CSS reset setting box-sizing: border-box on all elements and pseudo-elements.
  • Document in comments how content-box sizing plus main padding broke max-width centering and caused the ~64px offset.
| `assets/dialx/research.css` | | Standardize pill labeling and appearance in ranked tables for consistent visual treatment. |
  • Relabel single-letter 'A' pills to 'A VIABLE' for Anthropic model rows to match peer pill widths.
  • Ensure partial verdict pills use the rs-pill--dim modifier to get the intended subtle outlined style rather than plain text.
| `2026-05-15_claude-code-via-dial-poc/index.html`
`2026-05-19_choosing-memory-for-enterprise-agents/index.html` |
---
Tips and commands #### Interacting with Sourcery - **Trigger a new review:** Comment `@sourcery-ai review` on the pull request. - **Continue discussions:** Reply directly to Sourcery's review comments. - **Generate a GitHub issue from a review comment:** Ask Sourcery to create an issue from a review comment by replying to it. You can also reply to a review comment with `@sourcery-ai issue` to create an issue from it. - **Generate a pull request title:** Write `@sourcery-ai` anywhere in the pull request title to generate a title at any time. You can also comment `@sourcery-ai title` on the pull request to (re-)generate the title at any time. - **Generate a pull request summary:** Write `@sourcery-ai summary` anywhere in the pull request body to generate a PR summary at any time exactly where you want it. You can also comment `@sourcery-ai summary` on the pull request to (re-)generate the summary at any time. - **Generate reviewer's guide:** Comment `@sourcery-ai guide` on the pull request to (re-)generate the reviewer's guide at any time. - **Resolve all Sourcery comments:** Comment `@sourcery-ai resolve` on the pull request to resolve all Sourcery comments. Useful if you've already addressed all the comments and don't want to see them anymore. - **Dismiss all Sourcery reviews:** Comment `@sourcery-ai dismiss` on the pull request to dismiss all existing Sourcery reviews. Especially useful if you want to start fresh with a new review - don't forget to comment `@sourcery-ai review` to trigger a new review! #### Customizing Your Experience Access your [dashboard](https://app.sourcery.ai) to: - Enable or disable review features such as the Sourcery-generated pull request summary, the reviewer's guide, and others. - Change the review language. - Add, remove or edit custom review instructions. - Adjust other review settings. #### Getting Help - [Contact our support team](mailto:support@sourcery.ai) for questions or feedback. - Visit our [documentation](https://docs.sourcery.ai) for detailed guides and information. - Keep in touch with the Sourcery team by following us on [X/Twitter](https://x.com/SourceryAI), [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/sourcery-ai/) or [GitHub](https://github.com/sourcery-ai).

ledger.author: qodo-code-review[bot]
ledger.body:
Review Summary by Qodo

Fix topbar alignment and pill visual consistency bugs 🐞 Bug fix

Walkthroughs

Description 
• Fix topbar misalignment by 63.5px using global box-sizing: border-box reset
• Add rs-pill--dim class to Tencent partial verdict for outline consistency
• Relabel three Anthropic tier pills from "A" to "A VIABLE" for visual consistency
Diagram
```mermaid flowchart LR A["CSS box-sizing issue"] -->|"Add global border-box reset"| B["Topbar aligns with body"] C["Partial pill no outline"] -->|"Add rs-pill--dim class"| D["Consistent pill styling"] E["Single-letter A pills"] -->|"Relabel to A VIABLE"| F["Uniform pill widths"] ```

File Changes

1. 2026-05-15_claude-code-via-dial-poc/index.html 🐞 Bug fix +3/-3
>Relabel Anthropic tier pills for consistency >
>• Relabel three Anthropic Claude model tier pills from "A" to "A VIABLE"
>• Maintains tier classification while fixing visual inconsistency with single-letter appearance
>• Affects Haiku 4.5, Sonnet 4.6, and Opus 4.7 rows in ranked table
>
> > 2026-05-15_claude-code-via-dial-poc/index.html
2. 2026-05-19_choosing-memory-for-enterprise-agents/index.html 🐞 Bug fix +1/-1
>Add dim styling to partial verdict pill >
>• Add rs-pill--dim class to Tencent maintenance posture "partial" verdict pill
>• Changes from partial to partial
>• Adds subtle white outline at low alpha to match visual treatment of other verdict pills
>
> > 2026-05-19_choosing-memory-for-enterprise-agents/index.html
3. assets/dialx/research.css 🐞 Bug fix +7/-0
>Add global box-sizing border-box reset >
>• Add global CSS reset: *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; }
>• Placed at top of stylesheet before other rules
>• Fixes root cause of topbar misalignment by ensuring max-width caps border box instead of content
>  box
>• Allows margin: 0 auto to properly center main element, aligning topbar mark with body section
>  labels
>
> > assets/dialx/research.css
